meta.description: Wild Rift support champion data – updated with QWER skill references and pick/avoid examples

champions.name: Alistar

goodAgainst.name: Blitzcrank
goodAgainst.note: Knocks him away from ADC with W

champions.caution: W+Q is your main engage – don't waste it.
champions.tips: Use Flash + Q for surprise engages. Use R for extra tankiness.
pickWhen: Need a tanky engage support
Enemy has squishy immobile bot lane (e.g., Senna, Janna)
Your ADC wants an aggressive lane (e.g., Draven, Samira)
avoidWhen: Enemy has Morgana (black shield counters your CC)
Enemy has heavy poke that can kite you (e.g., Brand, Zyra)
Your ADC needs sustain (e.g., Kog'Maw)

champions.name: Amumu
champions.caution: Your Q has a long CD early. Don't miss it.
champions.tips: Q for engage. W for damage. R for teamfight CC.
pickWhen: Team needs AoE CC for teamfights
Enemy has grouped up (e.g., low mobility comp)
Your ADC can follow up on your engage (e.g., Samira, Miss Fortune)
avoidWhen: Enemy has heavy disengage (e.g., Janna, Morgana)
Your team needs peel rather than engage
Enemy has mobile carries that can dodge your Q

champions.name: Bard

goodAgainst.name: Thresh
goodAgainst.note: Dodge hook, poke him with Q

champions.caution: Roaming leaves your ADC 1v2. Time your roams carefully.
champions.tips: Collect chimes for movespeed and mana. R can save teammates or set up picks.
pickWhen: You can roam effectively and your ADC is self-sufficient (e.g., Ezreal)
Enemy bot lane is immobile and you can poke (e.g., Janna, Sona)
Your team needs catch potential with R
avoidWhen: Enemy has heavy dive supports (e.g., Nautilus, Alistar)
Your ADC needs constant protection (e.g., Kog'Maw, Vayne)
Enemy has strong sustain that outheals your poke (e.g., Soraka)

champions.name: Blitzcrank
champions.caution: Missed hook = 15s cooldown. Don't hook tanks into your team.
champions.tips: W + Flash + E guarantees knockup. Position in bushes for surprise hooks.
pickWhen: Enemy has immobile squishy supports (e.g., Senna, Soraka)
Your ADC needs early kill pressure (e.g., Draven, Lucian)
Team needs pick potential
avoidWhen: Enemy has Morgana (black shield) or Alistar (peel)
Enemy has tanky front line that can soak your hook
Your ADC is weak early (e.g., Vayne, Kog'Maw)

champions.name: Brand
champions.caution: Very squishy. Needs to position safely.
champions.tips: Passive detonation does % HP damage. Combo: E > Q > W.
pickWhen: Enemy team clumps up (e.g., engages with multiple melee)
Your team needs magic damage
Enemy has low mobility supports that can't dodge your skillshots
avoidWhen: Enemy has mobile divers that can jump on you (e.g., Pyke, Leona)
Enemy has multiple spell shields (e.g., Sivir, Morgana)
Your team lacks frontline to protect you

champions.name: Braum

badAgainst.name: Brand
badAgainst.note: Blocks his passive? Actually Brand's passive is not a projectile; Braum's E doesn't stop it.

champions.caution: Can't block all projectiles. Unbreakable (E) has cooldown.
champions.tips: Stack passive with autos and Q. Use E to block key abilities.
pickWhen: Enemy has heavy projectile poke (e.g., Ezreal, Varus, Miss Fortune)
Your ADC needs protection and you have follow-up (e.g., Lucian, Ashe)
Team needs a frontline that can peel
avoidWhen: Enemy has high magic damage that bypasses your E (e.g., Brand, Zyra)
Enemy has strong engage that can ignore your peel (e.g., Alistar, Leona)
Your team needs engage rather than peel

champions.name: Galio
champions.caution: Your ultimate has a long CD. Use it wisely.
champions.tips: W for taunt. E for engage. R for global peel.
pickWhen: Enemy has heavy AP damage (Galio's MR scaling)
Team needs engage and peel
Your ADC is immobile and needs protection (e.g., Jinx)
avoidWhen: Enemy is full AD (Galio's MR is less effective)
Your team needs pure engage rather than utility
Enemy has strong disengage (e.g., Janna, Morgana)

champions.name: Janna
champions.caution: Very squishy. One hook and you're dead.
champions.tips: Use Q to interrupt engages. Shield (E) ADC before trades.
pickWhen: Enemy has dive/engage champions you can disengage (e.g., Leona, Alistar)
Your ADC needs peel and protection (e.g., Vayne, Kog'Maw)
Team needs disengage to avoid hard engages
avoidWhen: Enemy has hook supports that can delete you
Your team needs engage rather than disengage
Enemy has heavy poke that outranges you (e.g., Brand, Xerath)

champions.name: Karma
champions.caution: Mantra (R) Q is great poke but costs mana. Use wisely.
champions.tips: Mantra (R) E gives big shield + move speed. Mantra (R) W roots.
pickWhen: Enemy has immobile bot lane (e.g., Ashe, Sona) and you can poke
Your ADC benefits from shields and speed (e.g., Ezreal, Jhin)
Team needs utility and poke
avoidWhen: Enemy has sustain that outheals your poke (e.g., Soraka, Nami)
Your team needs engage rather than poke
Enemy has dive that can bypass your shields (e.g., Alistar, Rakan)

champions.name: Leona
champions.caution: E is your engage — if you miss, you're vulnerable.
champions.tips: E + Q + R is your full combo. Use W before engaging for tankiness.
pickWhen: Enemy has immobile squishy bot lane (e.g., Senna, Sona)
Your ADC has strong early burst (e.g., Draven, Samira)
Team needs hard engage
avoidWhen: Enemy has Morgana (black shield) or Janna (disengage)
Your ADC needs peel rather than engage (e.g., Kog'Maw)
Enemy has heavy poke that can chunk you before you engage (e.g., Brand, Zyra)

champions.name: Lulu
champions.caution: Very squishy. Position behind ADC.
champions.tips: Use W on ADC for attack speed, on enemy for polymorph. R saves lives.
pickWhen: Your ADC is a hypercarry that needs peel and buffs (e.g., Vayne, Kog'Maw)
Enemy has engage you can polymorph (e.g., Alistar, Leona)
Team needs anti-burst protection
avoidWhen: Enemy has hook supports that can delete you
Your ADC is strong early and needs engage (e.g., Draven, Samira)
Enemy has heavy poke that outranges you (e.g., Brand, Xerath)

champions.name: Lux
champions.caution: Very squishy. Q is your only self-peel.
champions.tips: Q + E + R is your kill combo. Shield (W) before trades.
pickWhen: Enemy has immobile bot lane (e.g., Ashe, Sona)
Your ADC can follow up on your root (e.g., Caitlyn, Jhin)
Team needs poke and burst
avoidWhen: Enemy has hook supports that can delete you
Enemy has assassins that can dive you
Your team needs sustain rather than burst

champions.name: Morgana
champions.caution: Black shield (E) has long cooldown. Use it wisely.
champions.tips: Q is a long root — use it to catch enemies. E shields allies.
pickWhen: Enemy has engage/hook supports (e.g., Thresh, Blitz, Leona)
Your ADC needs spell shield protection (e.g., against hooks)
Team needs pick potential with root
avoidWhen: Enemy has sustain that outlasts your poke (e.g., Soraka, Nami)
Enemy has long-range poke that outranges you (e.g., Senna, Xerath)
Your team needs hard engage rather than peel

champions.name: Nami
champions.caution: Bubble (Q) is your only CC — don't miss it.
champions.tips: E on ADC for extra damage + slow. W bounces for heal/poke.
pickWhen: Your ADC has strong early trades (e.g., Lucian, Draven)
Enemy has engage you can counter with bubble (e.g., Leona, Alistar)
Team needs sustain and poke
avoidWhen: Enemy has hook supports that can delete you
Your ADC is immobile and needs peel rather than poke (e.g., Kog'Maw)
Enemy has heavy poke that outranges you (e.g., Brand, Xerath)

champions.name: Nasus
champions.caution: Weak early. Need to scale.
champions.tips: W for slow. E for armor shred. Farm Q for scaling.
pickWhen: Enemy has auto-attack dependent ADC (e.g., Vayne, Draven) – Wither shuts them down
Your ADC is self-sufficient and can farm safely (e.g., Ezreal)
Team needs a scaling utility support
avoidWhen: Enemy has early pressure and can deny your scaling (e.g., Leona, Brand)
Your team needs engage rather than utility
Enemy has Morgana (black shield) to negate your W

champions.name: Nautilus
champions.caution: Hook is your engage — don't hook tanks into your team.
champions.tips: Hook (Q) + passive root + E slow is your combo. Ult (R) locks down carries.
pickWhen: Enemy has immobile squishy supports (e.g., Senna, Soraka)
Your ADC needs engage and peel (e.g., Samira, Draven)
Team needs point-and-click CC (R)
avoidWhen: Enemy has Morgana (black shield) or Alistar (peel)
Enemy has heavy poke that can kite you (e.g., Brand, Zyra)
Your ADC is weak early and can't follow up (e.g., Kog'Maw)

champions.name: Pantheon
champions.caution: Fall off late game. Use early pressure.
champions.tips: E for block. W for stun. R for roam.
pickWhen: Enemy has squishy bot lane you can burst (e.g., Senna, Sona)
You need to roam and help other lanes (e.g., with R)
Your ADC can 1v2 while you roam (e.g., Ezreal)
avoidWhen: Enemy has tanky comp that can survive your burst (e.g., Alistar, Braum)
Your ADC needs constant peel (e.g., Kog'Maw, Jinx)
Game is likely to go late

champions.name: Pyke
champions.caution: Very squishy. Must land hooks or be useless.
champions.tips: W gives invisibility and move speed. R executes and resets.
pickWhen: Enemy has immobile squishy supports (e.g., Senna, Soraka)
Your ADC has early burst (e.g., Draven, Samira)
Team needs pick and assassination potential
avoidWhen: Enemy has Morgana (black shield) or Alistar (peel)
Enemy has tanks that can survive your burst
Your ADC is weak early and can't follow up (e.g., Kog'Maw)

champions.name: Rakan
champions.caution: E is your escape — save it to get out after engaging.
champions.tips: W knockup + Q + E back is your poke combo. Ultimate (R) charms enemies.
pickWhen: You have Xayah as ADC (special synergy)
Enemy has immobile squishy supports (e.g., Senna, Sona)
Your ADC has strong follow-up (e.g., Samira, Tristana)
avoidWhen: Enemy has Morgana (black shield) or Janna (disengage)
Enemy has heavy poke that can chunk you before you engage (e.g., Brand, Zyra)
Your ADC is weak early and can't follow up (e.g., Kog'Maw)

champions.name: Rell

badAgainst.name: Braum
badAgainst.note: Can block your engage with E

champions.caution: Your W is slow. Predict enemy movement.
champions.tips: W for engage, E for stun, R for teamfight CC.
pickWhen: Enemy has grouped up and you can land multi-target CC
Your ADC can follow up on your engage (e.g., Samira, Miss Fortune)
Team needs a tanky engage support
avoidWhen: Enemy has heavy disengage (e.g., Janna, Morgana)
Your team needs pick potential rather than teamfight engage
Enemy has mobile carries that can dodge your W

champions.name: Senna
champions.caution: Very squishy. Bad positioning gets you killed instantly.
champions.tips: Collect souls from poke. Build lethality for damage, enchanter for utility.
pickWhen: Enemy has enchanter support you can out-poke (e.g., Soraka, Nami)
Your team has frontline to protect you
You need scaling utility (heal, shield, root)
avoidWhen: Enemy has hard engage that can delete you (e.g., Leona, Blitz)
Enemy has multiple assassins that can dive you
Your team lacks frontline

champions.name: Seraphine
champions.caution: Very squishy. Position carefully.
champions.tips: Double cast E for root, double cast W for heal. Ultimate (R) is game-changing.
pickWhen: Enemy has engage comp you can kite (e.g., Alistar, Rakan)
Your team needs AP damage and utility
Team needs teamfight control with R
avoidWhen: Enemy has mobile assassins that can dive you (e.g., Pyke, Zed)
Enemy has hook supports that can delete you
Your team needs pure engage rather than utility

champions.name: Sona
champions.caution: Very squishy. One hook and you're dead.
champions.tips: Stack Q for poke, W for sustain, E for speed. Ult (R) is game-changing.
pickWhen: Your ADC is a hypercarry that benefits from sustain and buffs (e.g., Vayne, Kog'Maw)
Enemy lacks hard engage (no hooks/dives)
Team needs scaling utility and sustain
avoidWhen: Enemy has hook supports that can delete you
Enemy has early kill pressure (e.g., Leona, Draven)
Your team needs engage rather than sustain

champions.name: Soraka
champions.caution: Very squishy. Heal uses HP — position safely.
champions.tips: Use Q to regain HP. Save R for cross-map saves.
pickWhen: Your ADC is a hypercarry that needs sustain (e.g., Vayne, Kog'Maw)
Enemy has poke you can out-sustain (e.g., Brand, Lux)
Team needs global healing (R)
avoidWhen: Enemy has hook supports that can delete you
Enemy has burst that can oneshot your ADC before you heal (e.g., Draven, Pyke)
Your team needs engage rather than sustain

champions.name: Taric

goodAgainst.name: Leona
goodAgainst.note: Heal through her engage with Q

goodAgainst.name: Nautilus
goodAgainst.note: Heal through his engage with Q

goodAgainst.name: Alistar
goodAgainst.note: Heal through his combo with Q

champions.caution: Your ultimate (R) has a delay. Predict engages.
champions.tips: Q for heal. W for shield. E for stun. R for invulnerability.
pickWhen: Enemy has melee engage you can heal through (e.g., Leona, Alistar)
Your ADC needs sustain and your team needs frontline
Team needs invulnerability to counter burst
avoidWhen: Enemy has heavy poke that can chunk you before you engage (e.g., Brand, Zyra)
Your team needs hard engage rather than sustain
Enemy has Morgana (black shield) to block your stun

champions.name: Thresh
champions.caution: Hook is your engage — don't hook tanks into your team.
champions.tips: Use Q to hook, E to flay, R to slow. W saves teammates.
pickWhen: Enemy has immobile squishy supports (e.g., Senna, Soraka)
Your ADC has strong follow-up (e.g., Draven, Kalista)
Team needs engage and peel
avoidWhen: Enemy has Morgana (black shield) or Alistar (peel)
Enemy has heavy poke that can kite you (e.g., Brand, Zyra)
Your ADC is weak early and can't follow up (e.g., Kog'Maw)

champions.name: Veigar
champions.caution: Weak early game. Needs to stack AP safely.
champions.tips: Use cage (E) to zone and trap. Stack passive on minions and champions.
pickWhen: Your team needs magic damage and scaling
Enemy has immobile champions you can trap (e.g., Draven, Tristana)
You can safely stack AP against low-pressure bot lane
avoidWhen: Enemy has Sivir (spellshield) or Olaf (ignores cage)
Enemy has early pressure that can deny your scaling (e.g., Draven, Leona)
Your team needs engage rather than scaling

champions.name: Vel'Koz
champions.caution: Squishy and immobile. Position carefully.
champions.tips: Q for poke. W for waveclear. E for CC. R for true damage burst.
pickWhen: Enemy has immobile bot lane (e.g., Ashe, Sona)
Your ADC can follow up on your CC (e.g., Jhin, Caitlyn)
Team needs poke and true damage
avoidWhen: Enemy has engage supports that can dive you (e.g., Leona, Nautilus)
Enemy has mobile assassins that can jump on you
Your team lacks frontline

champions.name: Xerath
champions.caution: Squishy and immobile. Position is crucial.
champions.tips: Q for poke. W for slow. E for stun. R for burst.
pickWhen: Enemy has immobile bot lane (e.g., Ashe, Sona)
Your ADC can follow up on your CC (e.g., Jhin, Caitlyn)
Team needs long-range poke and burst
avoidWhen: Enemy has engage supports that can dive you (e.g., Leona, Nautilus)
Enemy has mobile assassins that can jump on you
Your team lacks frontline

champions.name: Yuumi
champions.caution: You are your ADC's item. If they die, you die.
champions.tips: Attach to your ADC. Heal with E, poke with Q, ult (R) to win.
pickWhen: Your ADC is self-sufficient and benefits from sustain (e.g., Ezreal, Zeri)
Enemy has engage you can dodge by attaching
Team needs scaling utility and heals
avoidWhen: Your ADC is weak early and needs peel (e.g., Vayne, Kog'Maw)
Enemy has heavy poke that can force you off your ADC (e.g., Senna, Brand)
Your team needs engage rather than sustain

champions.name: Zilean
champions.caution: Squishy. Position carefully.
champions.tips: Q for stun. W for CD reset. E for speed. R for revive.
pickWhen: Enemy has engage supports you can speed away from (e.g., Blitz, Nautilus)
Your ADC benefits from movespeed (e.g., Ezreal, Lucian)
Team needs revive utility to counter burst
avoidWhen: Enemy has heavy poke that can outrange you (e.g., Brand, Xerath)
Your team needs engage rather than utility
Enemy has Morgana (black shield) to block your Q stun

champions.name: Zyra
champions.caution: Rooted while using abilities. Position safely.
champions.tips: Place plants in hook paths to block skillshots. E + W + Q is your poke combo.
pickWhen: Enemy has engage supports (plants counter hooks) (e.g., Thresh, Blitz)
Your team needs AP damage and zone control
Enemy has immobile bot lane that can't dodge plants
avoidWhen: Enemy has sustain that outheals your poke (e.g., Soraka, Nami)
Enemy has champions that can kill plants easily (e.g., Miss Fortune, Lucian)
Your team lacks frontline and you get dived
